description: Use this API to delete the specified zero sequence mutual coupling from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = purgmut(ibus1, jbus1, ckt1, ibus2, jbus2, ckt2)
python_syntax: ierr = purgmut(ibus1, jbus1, ckt1, ibus2, jbus2, ckt2)

parameters.name: ibus1
parameters.description: One of the buses connected by the first branch of the mutual coupling. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus1
parameters.description: Other bus connected by the first branch of the mutual coupling. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ckt1
parameters.description: Circuit identifier of the first branch of the mutual coupling. (input; ‘1’ by default).

parameters.name: ibus2
parameters.description: One of the buses connected by the second branch of the mutual coupling. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus2
parameters.description: Other bus connected by the second branch of the mutual coupling. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ckt2
parameters.description: Circuit identifier of the second branch of the mutual coupling. (input; ‘1’ by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
